title: Fleet Snapshot
description: The fleet.json file published to gh-pages/public/ by dashboard-snapshot.yml. Each repo entry is an aggregation of per-workflow run records built by build-fleet.sh.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this snapshot was built.

repos.description: Array of aggregated repo health entries, sorted alphabetically by repository.

ref.description: Destination branch from the most recent run record.

sha.description: Commit SHA from the most recent run record.

trigger.description: Event name from the most recent run record.

pr_number.description: PR number from the most recent run record.

run_url.description: URL of the most recent Actions run.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the most recent run record.

overall.description: Rolled-up result. failure if any job failed/cancelled, success if all ran jobs passed.

maturity.description: Maturity tier from the GitHub org custom property 'maturity' (defaults to prototype).

jobs.description: Per-pill results. Each value is an object with status and the timestamp of that specific check's last run.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the last run for this specific check.

run_url.description: URL of the specific Actions run for this check.
